description.en: Never miss a prayer, wherever you are.
description.nl: Mis nooit meer een gebed, waar je ook bent.
description.de: Verpasse nie wieder ein Gebet, egal wo du bist.
description.fr: Ne manquez jamais une prière, où que vous soyez.
description.it: Non perdere mai una preghiera, ovunque tu sia.
description.sv: Missa aldrig en bön, var du än är.
description.no: Gå aldri glipp av en bønn, uansett hvor du er.
description.es: No te pierdas nunca una oración, estés donde estés.
description.da: Gå aldrig glip af en bøn, uanset hvor du er.
description.ru: Никогда не пропускайте молитву, где бы вы ни были.
description.pl: Nigdy nie przegap modlitwy, gdziekolwiek jesteś.
description.ko: 어디에 있든 예배 시간을 놓치지 마세요.

1.4.29.en: Add global Flow tokens for prayer times (athan_fajr, athan_dhuhr, athan_asr, athan_maghrib, athan_isha, athan_suhoor, month_is_ramadan) — readable by any app or flow

1.4.30.en: Fix Prayer Schedule device pairing — now appears in Add Device

1.4.31.en: Fix Prayer Schedule device not appearing in pairing list

1.4.32.en: Fix Prayer Schedule device pairing via Homey Compose driver manifest

1.4.33.en: Fix Prayer Schedule device pairing — driver.compose.json in correct location

2.0.0.en: Major update: Added Prayer Schedule virtual device exposing all prayer times as capabilities (readable by other apps like Gemini). Added global Flow tokens for all prayer times. Added Web API endpoint for external integrations. Added Arabic localization. Added retry logic for daily sync. Fixed flow cards after Homey Compose migration.

2.1.0.en: Suhoor time is now always shown and triggered regardless of Ramadan — use the 'Is Ramadan' Flow token to act on it conditionally. Removed virtual Prayer Schedule device. Renamed Flow token to month_is_ramadan.

2.1.2.en: Fixed memory leaks: settings listener and retry timeouts now properly cleaned up on app restart.

2.2.0.en: Added translations for Dutch, German, French, Italian, Swedish, Norwegian, Spanish, Danish, Russian, Polish and Korean — covering the app description, Flow cards and prayer names.
